calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-12-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar May-22-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maureen Howard.
Eric Shiu, Esq. for Plaintiff: CNET Networks, Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness: Guy Lugliani, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Consumer Electronic Warehouse, LLC. as follows:
Damages $26,334.00
Prejudgment Interest $1,975.83
Attorney's Fees $1,000.00
Costs $585.00, for a total of $29,894.83
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-03-2007 Continued To Jun-22-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
